title: Bamboo-based Air Filtration System
abstract: Low-cost air purifiers using indigenous bamboo materials sourced from local farms.
problem_solved: Urban air pollution in Metro Manila affecting low-income communities

title: Mobile Flood Early Warning System
abstract: SMS-based alerts for flood-prone barangays using low-cost river water sensors.
problem_solved: Lack of timely flood warnings in low-income riverside communities

title: Solar-powered Water Purifier for Off-grid Barangays
abstract: Harnessing solar energy to purify water in communities without grid electricity.
problem_solved: Lack of clean drinking water in remote rural areas
